name: Generate Random Float within Range
short_description: Generates a random floating-point number uniformly distributed between a specified lower and upper bound, rounded to two decimal places.

inputs.name: low
inputs.description: The lower bound of the range for the random value generation.

inputs.name: high
inputs.description: The upper bound of the range for the random value generation.

name: Single Factor Portfolio Stress Test Impact
short_description: Calculate the impact on a portfolio's value due to a single stress factor change, given the portfolio's sensitivity.

inputs.name: portfolio_value
inputs.description: The initial value of the portfolio.

inputs.name: factor_change
inputs.description: The percentage change in the stress factor.

inputs.name: sensitivity
inputs.description: The portfolio's sensitivity to the stress factor.

name: Stock Sensitivity to External Shock
short_description: Calculates the impact on a stock's value given an external shock and its sensitivity.

inputs.name: stock_value
inputs.description: Initial value of the stock

inputs.name: shock
inputs.description: Magnitude of the external shock (in percentage)

inputs.name: sensitivity
inputs.description: Sensitivity of the stock price to the external shock

name: Multi-Asset Portfolio Interest Rate Sensitivity
short_description: Calculates the change in a multi-asset portfolio's value due to an interest rate factor change, considering individual asset weights and sensitivities.

inputs.name: P
inputs.description: Initial total value of the portfolio.

inputs.name: w1
inputs.description: Weight of Asset 1 in the portfolio (as a percentage, e.g., 25 for 25%).

inputs.name: w2
inputs.description: Weight of Asset 2 in the portfolio (as a percentage, e.g., 30 for 30%).

inputs.name: w3
inputs.description: Weight of Asset 3 in the portfolio (as a percentage, e.g., 45 for 45%).

inputs.name: s1
inputs.description: Sensitivity of Asset 1 to the interest rate factor change.

inputs.name: s2
inputs.description: Sensitivity of Asset 2 to the interest rate factor change.

inputs.name: s3
inputs.description: Sensitivity of Asset 3 to the interest rate factor change.

inputs.name: dR
inputs.description: Percentage change in the interest rate factor (e.g., 1.5 for a 1.5% increase, -2 for a 2% decrease).

name: Option Vega Sensitivity
short_description: Calculates the change in an option's value given its Vega and a change in the underlying asset's volatility.

inputs.name: vega
inputs.description: Option's Vega, representing the change in option value per 1% change in volatility.

inputs.name: vol_change
inputs.description: Change in the underlying asset's volatility, in percentage points.

name: Multi-factor Portfolio Stress Test
short_description: Calculates the combined impact on a diversified portfolio from credit and market shocks, considering their respective sensitivities.

inputs.name: portfolio_value
inputs.description: Initial value of the diversified portfolio.

inputs.name: credit_shock
inputs.description: Percentage change due to credit shock (e.g., -6 for -6%).

inputs.name: market_shock
inputs.description: Percentage change due to market shock (e.g., -4 for -4%).

inputs.name: credit_sensitivity
inputs.description: Portfolio's sensitivity to credit shocks.

inputs.name: market_sensitivity
inputs.description: Portfolio's sensitivity to market shocks.
